mapper.sql: id, register_id, patient_id, request_type, request_id, report_title, report_text, report_file_url, report_time, is_viewed, viewed_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_report ( register_id, patient_id, request_type, request_id, report_title, report_text, report_file_url, report_time, is_viewed, viewed_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{patientId}, #{requestType}, #{requestId}, #{reportTitle}, #{reportText}, #{reportFileUrl}, #{reportTime}, #{isViewed}, #{viewedTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT mr.id AS id, mr.report_title AS reportTitle, mr.request_type AS requestType, CASE mr.request_type WHEN 'INSPECTION' THEN '检验报告' WHEN 'CHECK' THEN '检查报告' WHEN 'IMAGE' THEN '影像报告' ELSE '其他' END AS requestTypeName, d.dept_name AS deptName, p.real_name AS patientName, mr.report_time AS reportTime, mr.report_text AS reportText, mr.is_viewed AS isViewed, mr.report_file_url AS reportFileUrl FROM medical_report mr LEFT JOIN register r ON mr.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN patient p ON mr.patient_id = p.id WHERE mr.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_report SET is_viewed = 1, viewed_time = #{viewedTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
